none.justification: Correctly separates the local decrRefCount cases from ownership-transfer cases and accounts for the LCS temporary objects plus the INCR/INCRBYFLOAT/INCREX value objects. Minor naming slips like msetnx vs msetex do not change the lifecycle classification.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT lifecycle split: local frees for the milliseconds temps and LCS placeholders, and no local decref for DB-owned new value objects in incrDecrCommand, incrbyfloatCommand, and increxCommand. It also explicitly notes KSN_INVALIDATE_KVOBJ is not a free.

lsp.justification: Correctly lists all allocation sites and classifies the same local-free and ownership-transfer categories required by the GT. Some function labels are imprecise, but the allocation lifetimes and categories are correct.
